    Examples Glimmer

  • the-chosenstars0 - Glimmer.js project created to learn & decide easier during our scrum dailies meeting who is the next person to share status.
  • glimmer_eatsstars0 - A demo PWA built with Glimmer.js.
  • glimmer-synthstars12 - Synthesizer built using WebAudio and Glimmer.js.
  • glimmer-js-online-offline-demostars2 - Sample Glimmer.js app: online/offline browser events.

  • glimmer-of-lifestars1 - An implementation of Conway's Game of Life using Glimmer.js.
  • endless-hoopsstars1 - It's a basketball game written in JavaScript/Canvas/Glimmer.js.
  • glimmer-hangmanstars0 - A implementation of the well-known game 'Hangman' in Glimmer.js.

    • Packages

    Codemods

  • ember-on-codemodstars0 - Replace use of Ember.on.
  • ember-es6-class-codemodstars60 - A codemod-cli project for converting Ember.js objects to es6 native classes.
  • ember-module-migratorstars77 - Automated migration for new Ember.js application layout.
  • ember-test-helpers-codemodstars29 - Codemod to transform your Ember.js tests to use @ember/test-helpers.
  • ember-memory-leaks-codemodstars0 - A collection of codemod's for fixing memory leaks in Ember.js applications.
  • ember-3x-codemodsstars0 - A Codemod with a collection of transforms to address Ember.js 3.x deprecations.
  • ember-computed-getter-codemodstars0 - Ember.js Computed Getter Codemod.

    • Packages

    a11y

  • e-a11y-modalstars7 - A simple modal for accessible Ember.js applications.
  • ember-a11y-landmarksstars19 - Ember.js addon to help with landmark roles for better accessibility.
  • ember-a11ystars85 - A collection of tools to build accessible Ember.js applications.
  • ember-component-focusstars21 - A mixin for adding methods to your Ember.js components that help you manage the currently focused element.
  • ember-gesturesstars160 - Ember.js gestures provides an easy way to use gestures by making it simple to define and use HammerJS managers and recognizers throughout your app.

    Code Splitting

  • ember-enginesstars486 - This Ember.js addon implements the functionality described in the Ember.js Engines RFC. Engines allow multiple logical applications to be composed together into a single application from the user's perspective.

    Data validation

  • ember-model-validatorstars141 - Add validations to your Ember Data models on an explicit and easy way, without a bunch a validations files around or complicated structure.
  • ember-validated-formstars58 - Easily create forms with client side validations.

    • Packages

    Debugging / Profiling

    Forms

  • ember-form-forstars136 - This Ember.js addon will give you an easy way to build good forms.

    • Packages

    Functional programming

  • Bacon.js - Functional reactive programming.
  • Folktale - Suite of libraries for generic functional programming in JavaScript that allows you to write elegant, modular applications with fewer bugs, and more reuse.
  • immutablestars31k - Immutable data collections.
  • Kefir.jsstars1 - Reactive library with focus on high performance and low memory usage.
  • Lazy.jsstars6k - Utility library similar to lodash/Underscore but with lazy evaluation, which can translate to superior performance in many cases.
  • lodash - Utility library delivering consistency, customization, performance, & extras. A better and faster Underscore.js.
  • mori - Library for using ClojureScript's persistent data structures and supporting API from the comfort of vanilla JavaScript.
  • Mout - Utility library with the biggest difference between other existing solutions is that you can choose to load only the modules/functions that you need, no extra overhead.
  • Ramda - Utility library with a focus on flexible functional composition enabled by automatic currying and reversed argument order. Avoids mutating data.
  • RxJS - Functional reactive library for transforming, composing, and querying various kinds of data.
  • underscore-contrib - The brass buckles on Underscore's utility belt.

    • Packages

    Helpers

  • ember-d3-helpersstars35 - Collection of Ember.js helpers for building composable D3 charts.
  • ember-store-helpersstars5 - This add-on provides helpers related to ember-data.
